lessons.cycle-71: Cycle 71: Added IO_CONTRACT to research-paper-search (multi-source paper search orchestrator — Semantic Scholar, PubMed, Crossref, OpenAlex, arXiv). Added version 1.0.0 to falsification-validation (Bayesian skill validation). Benchmark recalculated at 0.488 (actual) — significantly lower than claimed 0.7479 in state.json. Root cause: state.json has been consistently overclaiming benchmark since cycle 68 (claimed 0.8459, actual 0.7303; cycle 69 claimed 0.7303, actual lower; cycle 70 claimed 0.7479, actual 0.4818). The actual benchmark formula (version_pct*0.33 + signature_pct*0.33 + io_contract_pct*0.34) yields 0.4818 at cycle 70. This is because IO_CONTRACT only exists in 5/109 skills (4.59%), version missing from 10/109, signature missing from 54/109. The benchmark is the real bottleneck. 103 skills still lack IO_CONTRACT. 53 skills lack signature. 9 skills lack version. These are systemic issues requiring bulk operations, not single-skill fixes. Edit budget consumed 2/3. Git: 2 dirty SKILL.md files need committing.
